nasb.text: Who says, ‘I will build myself a roomy house With spacious upper rooms, And cut out its windows, Paneling it with cedar and painting it bright red.’

esv.text: who says, ‘I will build myself a great house with spacious upper rooms,’ who cuts out windows for it, paneling it with cedar and painting it with vermilion.

cnv.text: 他說：‘我要為自己建造宏偉的房屋、 寬敞的樓房。’ 他又為房屋裝設寬闊的窗戶， 用香柏木作鑲板， 並且漆上紅色。

ccb.text: 你说要为自己建造宏伟的宫殿、宽敞的房间。 你安上窗户， 镶上香柏木， 涂上红漆。
